text:
On Thu, Nov 05, 1998 at 02:10:00PM -0800, Tom Hukins wrote:

>  It seems I accidentally set this pr as being confidential when I sent

>  commit privs can change this.

I've changed it; I don't actually know what effect that field has,
though.

Matt
